hyperedges.label: ESP32 Dual HTTP Server Audio/Video Stream Architecture

nodes.label: Static IP 192.168.0.171
nodes.rationale: Static IP assignment via W5500 Ethernet ensures reliable addressing for the Jetson orchestrator to reach the MCU. Wi-Fi is a fallback only — Ethernet preferred for exhibition stability.

nodes.label: Port 81 HTTP Stream Server
nodes.rationale: Stream server separated onto port 81 to isolate high-bandwidth MJPEG/audio streams from control API traffic, preventing stream backpressure from blocking API responsiveness.

nodes.label: Microphone Capture Audio Tract
nodes.rationale: Mic capture and speaker playback are two independent I2S tracts. PCM5102A must never be used to diagnose mic issues — they share no signal path.

nodes.label: Speaker Ring Buffer 32KB DRAM
nodes.rationale: 32KB speaker buffer in DRAM (~372ms at 44100Hz). Write is rate-limited with 4ms I2S drain backoff instead of dropping frames to prevent audio glitches.

nodes.label: Mic Ring Buffer 256KB PSRAM
nodes.rationale: 256KB mic ring buffer in PSRAM provides ~4 seconds of stereo audio at 16kHz 16-bit — sufficient for command recording and WAV clip export.

nodes.label: I2S Microphone Capture Profiles
nodes.rationale: Multiple I2S format profiles (Philips/MSB, 16/32-bit, left/right/stereo) allow runtime reconfiguration without reflashing. Default is inmp441_philips32_stereo.

nodes.label: PCA9685 NVS Persistence
nodes.rationale: PCA9685 frequency and active scene are stored in NVS (Non-Volatile Storage) and restored on every reboot, preserving exhibition state across power cycles.

nodes.label: OTA Dual App Slot Partition Scheme
nodes.rationale: partitions.csv supports dual app slots — OTA writes to free slot then reboots, enabling safe over-the-air updates without losing current firmware on failure.
nodes.norm_label: ota dual app slot partition scheme

nodes.label: ESP32 Boot Sequence Stages
nodes.rationale: Boot stages: sensors→ethernet→ota→sounds→camera→mic→speaker→pca9685→web→running. Serial log confirms full bring-up in ~3 seconds plus boot sound at 5.8s.

nodes.label: Network Transport Priority Design
nodes.rationale: Ethernet W5500 has priority 1 over Wi-Fi STA (priority 2) and AP fallback (priority 3). Automatic selection at boot with no manual switching needed — designed for exhibition reliability.

hyperedges.label: ESP32 Dual HTTP Server Audio/Video Stream Architecture
